title: IMF Executive Board Concludes 2026 Article IV Consultation with Japan
tags: IMF Backs Further BOJ Rate Hikes to 1.5%, Urges Caution on Proposed Consumption Tax HolidayThe International Monetary Fund (IMF) has signaled strong support for the Bank of Japan’s ongoing policy normalization, forecasting a path toward a neutral interest rate of 1.5% by 2027, while simultaneously warning Tokyo against eroding fiscal discipline through broad tax cuts.
